justification: The question specifically asks for a prediction regarding the future stock price movements of a publicly traded company (IPG).
question:
Will IPG's market close price on 2025-11-16 be higher than its market close price on 2025-11-09?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
